headline: Cramer Says He's 'Not Bullish' On Gold — Plus His Advice For Domino's Pizza Investors
summary: On CNBC's “Mad Money Lightning Round,” Jim Cramer said the last quarter of Domino’s Pizza Inc was “not so hot,” adding, “We have to give it a quarter.” He recommended not buying the stock yet. Domino's, on April 27, reported...

headline: New York Times: More Than Just News, But Is the Valuation Good Enough?
summary: Berkshire bought NYT, but strong execution and optionality may not justify today's valuation premium
